title: alsophila horridula
intro: Alsophila horridula, also known as the horrid tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Alsophila horridula include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the rhizome of the Alsophila horridula plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
